query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contracts WHERE section='Boonphone') as bp_contracts,
  (SELECT MAX(CAST(external_id AS UNSIGNED)) FROM contracts WHERE section='Boonphone') as max_external_id;

SELECT contract_no, submit_date, external_id 
FROM contracts WHERE section='Boonphone' 
ORDER BY CAST(external_id AS UNSIGNED) DESC 
LIMIT 5;

SELECT id, entity, status, started_at, finished_at, row_count, 
       LEFT(error_message, 100) as err 
FROM sync_logs WHERE section='Boonphone' 
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;

SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM contracts WHERE section='Boonphone') as bp_contracts,
  (SELECT MAX(CAST(external_id AS UNSIGNED)) FROM contracts WHERE section='Boonphone') as max_external_id;

SELECT contract_no, submit_date, external_id 
FROM contracts WHERE section='Boonphone' 
ORDER BY CAST(external_id AS UNSIGNED) DESC 
LIMIT 5;

SELECT id, entity, status, started_at, finished_at, row_count, 
       LEFT(error_message, 100) as err 
FROM sync_logs WHERE section='Boonphone' 
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;
